title: CocoVaults Lite
description: A lightweight & Free plugin, compatible with NBT-Data & CustomModelData
body:
# CocoVaults Lite ### A lightweight plugin, free, compatible with NBT-Data & CustomModelData **MAINTAINED BY FRUITFORGE STUDIOS** --- I would appreciate it if you were kind when reviewing, and if you have a problem or complaints, feel free to send them to my Official [Discord](https://fruitforge.com/discord). The comments section is not for that.
## ⚡ Why Choose CocoVaults Lite? > CocoVaults is a **highly efficient** and **easy-to-use** plugin for storing items in virtual chests. It is **customizable**, supports **multiple files**, has a **robust anti-dupe system**, and is designed to perform optimally without **memory leaks**.
## ⚠️ ATTENTION! ⚠️ **This plugin does not support plugin loaders or the use of /reload.** ### Please protect your users' data.
[![Premium](https://img.shields.io/badge/NEED_MORE_POWER%3F-GET_PREMIUM_HERE-ffd700?style=for-the-badge&logo=spigotmc&labelColor=2e2e2e)](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/cocovaults-%E2%AD%90-powerful-custom-redis-mariadb-sql-cross-server-supports-%E2%AD%90-1-8-1-21-11.116965/)


# 🧩 Core Info | 📦 Virtual Vault System | 🧩 Integration Support | | :--- | :--- | | • **Virtual Chests:** Secure storage
• **Custom Icons:** Unique identity
• **Renaming:** Player customization
• **Space Monitors:** Real-time tracking
• **Opening Effects:** Audio/Visual cues | • **Custom Items:** Full compatibility
• **NBT Data:** Preserves metadata
• **ItemsAdder/Oraxen:** Ready to use
• **Nexo & Addons:** Stable support
• **API Hooks:** Developer friendly | | 🛡️ Advanced Security | 🚀 Performance & Support | | :--- | :--- | | • **Anti-Dupe Engine:** Active prevention
• **Audit Trails:** Action logging
• **Converters:** Migrate easily | • **Latency Guard:** Optimized ops
• **Async Pipelines:** No main-thread lag
• **Profiling Hooks:** Live tuning
• **Priority Support:** 24/7 assistance |
## 💻 Commands & Permissions ### Commands ```yaml /cv help # Show help /cv # Open a specific vault /cv gui # Open the vaults menu /cv rename # Rename a vault /cv icon # Change icon /cv admin reload # Reload config /cv admin view # View player's vault /cv admin forceopen # Force open vault /cv admin import # Import data /cv admin debug # Debug info /cv admin purge # Purge player data ``` ### Permissions ```yaml cocovaults.open # Open personal vaults (def: true) cocovaults.admin # Admin commands (def: op) cocovaults.rename # Rename vaults cocovaults.icon # Change icons cocovaults.quantity.X # Allow up to X vaults cocovaults.unlocked.X # Unlock vault X cocovaults.size.X # Set vault size (9-54) ```
